task.title: Codify alignment drift fixture matrix
task.summary: Add deterministic fixture cases for generally applicable alignment drift detection in fixture-only test assets.

goal.outcome: Known generally applicable alignment drift classes have deterministic fixture coverage independent of task-boundary enforcement and CodeWiki dogfood-only concerns.
acceptance: Fixture cases cover vertical drift, horizontal drift, stale generated output, missing accepted build, missing audit evidence, and invalid publication proof.
Each failing fixture asserts a specific issue kind or reconciliation item.
Clean fixture passes the same audit/graph check path.
Fixture runner is included in smoke or feature tests.
non_goals: Do not depend on network or remote Git state.
Do not include CodeWiki dogfood-only source/package confusion as a distributed general fixture.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Added portable alignment drift fixture matrix and smoke runner for TASK-090, excluding CodeWiki dogfood-only source confusion.

evidence: Added fixture matrix JSON and executable smoke runner using temporary repos plus buildGraph/writeValidationReport paths.
Excluded dogfood/source confusion from TASK-090 distributed fixture coverage because it is CodeWiki self-development-only.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: package.json includes alignment-drift-fixtures smoke in test:smoke.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added fixture matrix JSON and executable smoke runner using temporary repos plus buildGraph/writeValidationReport paths.
Excluded dogfood/source confusion from TASK-090 distributed fixture coverage because it is CodeWiki self-development-only.
code_change_evidence: package.json includes alignment-drift-fixtures smoke in test:smoke.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Fixture cases cover vertical drift, horizontal drift, stale generated output, missing accepted build, missing audit evidence, and invalid publication proof.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/fixtures/alignment-drift/matrix.json enumerates portable cases; tests/smoke/alignment-drift-fixtures.test.mjs asserts graph/audit/validation behavior for each class.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Each failing fixture asserts a specific issue kind or reconciliation item.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Smoke runner asserts missing_documentation_build, missing_planning_build, missing_accepted_build_coverage, stale-reference, roadmap-task-view-mismatch, audit_evidence, and publication-proof reconciliation.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Clean fixture passes the same audit/graph check path.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Clean temporary fixture runs file-structure audit and asserts it does not fail.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Fixture runner is included in smoke or feature tests.

closure_brief.user_intent: Implement TASK-090 portable alignment drift fixture matrix without CodeWiki dogfood-only source confusion.
implemented_changes: Added fixture matrix JSON enumerating generally applicable drift classes.
Added smoke runner covering graph traceability, audit drift, validation audit evidence, publication proof, and clean fixture path.
Included runner in npm run test:smoke.
Removed dogfood/source confusion from TASK-090 scope and fixture assertions.
non_goals_preserved: No network or remote Git dependency.
Did not include CodeWiki dogfood-only source confusion as distributed general fixture.
remaining_risks: Full npm test and validation before close.

risks: Full npm test and close validation still pending.

Added portable alignment drift fixture matrix and smoke runner for TASK-090, excluding CodeWiki dogfood-only source confusion.

Checks: node tests/smoke/alignment-drift-fixtures.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm run typecheck

Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
